feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fiori F1595 Stock Multiple Materials - Alternative UOM Functionality help?
entry.content:
Hello, there have been posts related to extending F1595 and some have found solutions, but no one really mentions which route actually worked for them. I have commented on those posts but have yet to receive a reply. 

Requirement:

Is there a method that seemed to work for anyone (i.e. CDS view extensions, custom Z app, modifying MPC_EXT / DPC_EXT)? My team has a requirement to add alternative UOM functionality (add custom filter field for AUOM, convert stock quantities into selected AUOM and populate custom fields).

Works in Sandbox environment with new upgrade (2025 version)

I was able to get this working in our sandbox system with appending custom fields to structure MMIM_MATERIAL_MULTI_STOCK. After that create new properties for the fields in the MPC_EXT. Added logic to convert base UOM quantities of each material to selected alternative UOM. Created local annotation file to display value help which is the same as the base UOM filter in the app but with single selection only. Created controller extension to send selected UOM back to the DPC_EXT for conversions, and additional logic in the controller for grand totals. Everything works fine in our sandbox. 

Dumping in back-end when moving to development system (2022 version)

We've moved the project over to our development system where we now get errors on the front-end and a dump on the backend in ST22. Our Sandbox has recently been upgraded but not our development system. Is this issue related to the versions being different? Again, everything works with no errors / dumps in Sandbox, but not the case in our development system. 

Diagnosis

When I comment out everything in my MPC_EXT enhancement, the back-end dump does not occur. The code is the same in both systems other than different field names. It seems as if our development system does not want to accept our new properties, but sandbox is ok with them.

Any help would be greatly appreciated! Please let me know if any further details are needed!

Thanks, Patrick P.

entry.title: Trans/event type field value not showing any value in Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue to display Trans/event type field value in Fiori, VIM Approval app.

We could able to display the respective field but value of the field is empty.

Below are the configurations which we done as part of this implementation,

Tcode - /opt/spro

 

 

 

 

 

Tcode - /otx/pf00_img

 

 

Output:

 

We couldn’t see the value of the field.

It should be Invoice/Credit memo/Subsequent debit/Subsequent credit

Could you please check and suggest further?

Regards,

Thanuja M.

entry.title: Field values not visible for Custom Fields added in Standard Fiori App Manage Customer Line Item
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a standard Fiori Application 'Manage Customer Line Items' in which few custom fields were already added into it and app was working fine in the Production system.

Now, we have a new requirement to add one more custom field into the App. We did this by adding a new field into an extended  CDS view which is basically an extention of  standard CDS I_ARLINEITEM (as all the other custom fields added in the past, were also added into this extended CDS view only). And this standard CDS view is binded to the Entityset inside a method (IF_SADL_GW_DPC_UTIL~GET_DPC) in DPC_EXT Class  of an extended OData. Now the Fiori app was working fine in TEST and Pre-Production system i.e. newly added custom field is visible in the List Report and value also getting populated into it.

But when we have moved the changes to Production system, then there, new custom field is visible but its not containing any value. Although, in the standard CDS view I_ARLINEITEM, value is there but its not getting visible into the Fiori App inside that new field. When we checked the response in the inspect(F12) then there also new field is not carrying any value. Also, when we checked the GET call in GW Client in SAP GUI for the ITEM Entityset then there also value is not coming inside the custom field.

Kindly guide.

Thanks.

entry.title: Prefer:odata.continue-on-error - Not working in ODATA V4 BATCH API call
entry.content:
Hi,

While Postman correctly returns both success and error responses for all payloads when the Prefer: odata.continue-on-error header is used, this same header fails to function as expected within the Fiori app's AJAX call. 

Case 1 : Suppose if all 5 payloads are successful, API gives a response for all 5 payloads .

Case 2: Total 3 payloads,  1st payload response is successful, 2  payload response fails with 400 error and skips 3rd payload response.




CAse 2 analysis - The API continues to return the first successful response and the second failed response, but then skips the third payload entirely.

FIORI APP SOURCE CODE

var URL = "/sap/opu/odata4/sap/-------------------/";

var msgarr = [];

$.ajax({

    url: URL,

    type: "POST",

    contentType: "multipart/mixed;boundary=batch",

    headers: {

        "X-CSRF-Token": UCSRFToken,

        "Prefer": "odata.continue-on-error"

    },

    data: sPayload,

    success: function (data, textStatus, jqXHR) {

        var a = data;

        var sResponse = jqXHR.responseText;

    }

});

Issue Summary: Why is the Prefer header not working in SAP Web IDE? Despite adding the header to the code above, the application still terminates processing after a payload failure, skipping subsequent responses.

Thanks,

Madhava

entry.title: Refreshing Integration Card Data on Dialog Close from Shell Plugin in SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP Build Work Zone (Advanced Edition), where I have implemented a Shell Plugin that opens a custom dialog.

Requirement:
After the dialog is closed, I need to trigger a refresh in an Integration Card that is present on the Work Zone Home screen. This refresh should result in the card fetching the latest data via its configured API.

I am looking for guidance on how to properly establish communication between a Shell Plugin and an Integration Card in this scenario.

Questions:

  • What is the recommended way to trigger or notify an Integration Card to refresh from a Shell Plugin?

  • Are there any supported communication mechanisms between Shell Plugins and Integration Cards in Work Zone Advanced?

  • Is there a standard approach to externally trigger a card’s data refresh or API call?

  • How are such cross-component interactions typically handled in Work Zone architecture?

Additional Context:
The Integration Card is developed using a standard MVC approach, with separate view and controller files handling the presentation and logic.

Any guidance, best practices, or references would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Navigating to BI dashboard via custom fiori tile
entry.content: I have a BI dashboard created in MS Azure , now I need to create a custom fiori tile which when clicked navigates to dashboard . Is it possible ?  and how to do it?

entry.title: Logon Suffix Dissappears
entry.content:
Good Day,

Could you please assist? Launching of a custom SAPUI5 website with the language and client suffix(?sap-language=EN&sapclient=100).

The language & client suffix does appear upon initial login, but disappears once the website is reloaded(login is cached).

The system is currently on S/4HANA 2023

I have gone through the config, the profile parameters are set, sicf configurations and the language is installed.

Manually appending the suffix to the website is not a option.

entry.title: SAP Dynamic Forms (CA-SDF) integrated with sap Ui5/Fiori application
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like to seek guidance regarding SAP Dynamic Forms integration with SAP UI5/Fiori applications.

Has anyone implemented or worked on integrating SAP Dynamic Forms within a SAP UI5 Fiori application? Any documentation, approach, best practices, or reference architecture would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your suggestions and experiences.

Regards,
Pragnesh Parmar

entry.title: Adaptation Project development with flp sandbox 404 error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

To enhance the standard Fiori App, we created the adaption project with VSCode.

Currently, we are facing flp sandbox 404 error during adaptation project development(Open Adaptation Editor & Preview Application).  Are any solutions for this error?

Background:

The back-end ABAP version is OP2023SP1.

Due to our internal internet is not able to reach 'https://ui5.sap.com',  we replaced it with 'http://< host name>:<service port>/sap/public/bc/ui5_ui5/' in ui5.yaml file to make sure the app could load those UI5 librarys such as sap-ui-core.js. By this way, we could preview the app with 'noflp' option but we face sanbox 404 error with the 'flp' option.

Unfortunately, it seems the adaptation project development(Both 'Open Adaptation Editor' and 'Preview Application') are using the 'flp' option only so that we could not avoid this error.

Thanks

Jon

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").
Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.
  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.
  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.
  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.
  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.
  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.
  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.
  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:
    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.
    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

Has anyone experienced something similar with BC-FES-ITS or CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2 dumps?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").

Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.

  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.

  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.

  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.

  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.

  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.

  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:

    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.

    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

It seems related specifically to WebGUI / ITS runtime because the dump occurs in:

CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Component: BC-FES-ITS

Has anyone experienced something similar before?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: LT10 single transfer order for multiple handling units in fiori app
entry.content:
My goal is to replicate the LT10 behavior by creating a custom Fiori application where a user can select multiple Handling Units from a list and trigger the creation of a single Transfer Order (TO) containing multiple items (one per HU), instead of multiple single-item TOs.

I started investigating RAP and creating custom CDS Views. Anyways I'm a begginer in SAP so my knowledge is insufficient.
My question is : is it even possible ?

if yes, how ?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Fiori Elements ALP (OData V2): Basic Search field shown despite @Search.searchable: false in CDS
entry.content:
Problem:

In an Analytical List Page (ALP) application based on a directly exposed CDS view, the Basic Search field is displayed in the SmartFilterBar, even though search is explicitly disabled by using the CDS Annotation: @search.searchable: false.

Analytical List Page (OData V2, UI5 1.71, SAP_BASIS 750)

Expectation: Basic Search should be hidden.
Actual behavior: Basic Search is still displayed.

Important:

  • No @search.* annotations on field level
  • Only @search.searchable: false on view level

Findings
The behavior appears to contradict the expected semantics of the annotation.
In this setup (SAP_BASIS 750 + UI5 1.71 + OData V2), the system behaves as follows:

The mere presence of the annotation @search.searchable (regardless of its value) seems to activate search capabilities in the OData service and UI.

As a result:

The SmartFilterBar interprets the service as search-enabled
The Basic Search field is displayed, even when set to false

Workaround
Remove (or comment out) the annotation completely
@search.searchable: false

Side Effect

After removing the annotation, the CDS view produces a syntax/activation warning or error similar to:
"@Search annotations require 'searchable' for the view"

However:

If the CDS is still activated (ignoring the warning)
The resulting behavior is that the Basic Search field is no longer displayed

entry.title: Not Able to Change the status of ChaRM
entry.content:
We have been trying to change the status of below CR from To Be SIT tested to To Be UAT tested and further, but it is not progressing to the next setup and gets reset to Being implemented.

Even though the object is transported to QA environment, CR status is moved to being implemented.

ERROR : Transport request xxxx has not yet been imported into system aaa

This appears to be a generic issue for all the minor CRs created for change cycle bbb at least.

Message No./TMWFLOW/TRANSPORT_N631


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Fiori business/Custom roles and catalog movement from existing client to new client in same system
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please answer the below queries.

1) what is the best practice for moving the fiori business/custom roles from activated fiori client to new client in same the system?

 - Can we skip the SAP_FIORI_CONTENT_ACTIVATION and SAP_FIORI_FCM_CONTENT_ACTIVATION task lists and move them through SCC1 to new client in advance?

2) what is the best practice for moving the fiori catalog and apps from activated fiori client to new client in the same system?

  - what options should I deselect in the below tasklists

SAP_FIORI_FOUNDATION_S4

SAP_FIORI_CONTENT_ACTIVATION

SAP_FIORI_FCM_CONTENT_ACTIVATION

SAP_FIORI_CATALOG_ACTIVATION

Please answer all of these.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Filter button missing from /UI2/FLPCA after upgrade to 2025
entry.content:
All,

As stated in the subject, since we've upgraded our on prem system to 2025 the filter button has disappeared from /UI2/FLPCM_CUST (& /UI2/FLPCM_CONF)  as well as /UI2/FLPCA..... 


Has anybody else experienced this and found a solution?

Thanks!

Jurjen

entry.title: Fiori Team Calendar (S/4HANA) Employee Detail Attributes
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I got a question regarding the new team calendar v4 (S/4HANA). In the old version (v2) there was a method within the BAdI HCMFAB_B_TEAMCALENDAR called IF_HCMFAB_TCAL_SETTINGS~GET_EMPLOYEE_DETAIL_ATTRIBUTES. There the detail attributes could be configured that pop up when clicking on the employee within the application. 

With the newer version that method can't be found anymore and I'm struggling to find the place, where the attributes within the detail view can be configured. Has anybody already done this configuration? I've been looking into the BAdI HRFIO_B_MYTEAMCALENDAR as that seems to be the one for the v4 version.

 

Thanks in advance and best regards!

entry.title: Roadmap for BTP CAPM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Glad to be part of this group and learn from experienced professionals.

I am currently working as an SAP Business ByDesign Technical Consultant and would like to start learning SAP BTP technologies such as CAPM, Fiori, SAP HANA Database, and SAP UI5 to become a full-stack SAP BTP developer.

Could you please guide me on:

Which topic should I start with first?

What would be the best learning path?

Any recommended resources, courses, or practice methods for clear understanding?

Your suggestions and guidance would be very helpful for my learning journey.

Regards,
Tirumala

entry.title: Unexpected Key 'ID' in Metadata After Adding @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
entry.content:
Getting unexpected key 'ID ' in metadata after adding @DefaultAggregation: #SUM in my cds 

If I remove the @DefaultAggregation: #SUM annotation, the error disappears. However, our business requirements state that we must display the total at the end, so this annotation is necessary. Please let me know if there are any solutions for this issue."

below is my code:
@EndUserText.label: 'Order Cost Analytics'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@vdm.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@ObjectModel.usageType: {
serviceQuality: #X,
sizeCategory: #S,
dataClass: #MIXED
}
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE
@odata.publish: true
define view entity /HCLDC/C_ORDERCOSTREPORTAPP
as select from /HCLDC/I_ORDERCOSTREPORTAPPDET
{
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key DocumentNumber,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]
key Object,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key MaintenanceNotification,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key ValueCategory,
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key MaintenanceOrder,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
key fiscalyear,
DocumentType,
DocumentVersion,
DocumentPart,
ControllingArea,
ObjectType,
MaintPriorityType,
MaintPriority,
MaintenanceProcessingPhase,
MaintObjectLocAcctAssgmtNmbr,
TopOrderNotification,
// @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 80 }]
ValueCategoryDesc,
// @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 90 }]
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
PlanningPlant,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
// @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
ActualCost,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
// @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
PlannedCost,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
// @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
TasklistCost,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS
ApprovalEstCost,
Equipment,
Assembly,
}

entry.title: ODATA services not found in BTP cockpit
entry.content:
Hello, i am connecting my on premises system to BAS.
1. Cloud connector setup is done and connection is fine between cloud connector and On premises system . on checking connection it says - "Backend is reachable from cloud connector".

2. Configures on premises system from BAS, entered all the variables like WebIDEUsage, WebIDEEnabled, HTML5.DynamicDestination, HTML5.Timeout

3. Getting below error when opening ON premises system from BAS - "

Could not get v2 and v4 services."
4. /IWFND/CONFIG is published in /n/IWFND/V4_ADMIN
5. Tcode- /n /IWFND/ERROR_LOG is showing error - Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered
6. While accessing url - https:///sap/opu/odata4/iwfnd/config/default/iwfnd/catalog/0002/ServiceGroups?$expand=DefaultSystem(...
getting error 
"Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered",

but as i mentioned /IWFND/CONFIG is already registered.

So, help me in setting up connection between BAS and On premises ERP
